title: What a cardiologist thinks of my cholesterol, with Michael Twyman, MD

chunks.title: Introduction to Cardiovascular Health
chunks.summary: The podcast introduces the host's discussion with cardiologist Michael Twyman, focusing on blood lipids, cardiovascular risk, and the relevance of an animal-based diet. Key topics include LDL cholesterol, cardiovascular risk factors, and contextualizing lipid levels within one's overall health.
chunks.transcript: I don't think there's a significant amount of cardiovascular disease that's clinically meaningful for humans that happens independent of insulin resistance and that insulin resistance may just not be diagnosed on this week's episode of the podcast I spoke to Michael Twyman he's a board-certified cardiologist and I started by asking him about my blood lipids what do you think about my lipids Mike and what do you think about my cardiovascular risk we then got into a really interesting conversation about APO B and cardiovascular risks oxidized LDL LP little a lppla2 seed oils all kinds of crazy stuff in this podcast maybe not crazy just very crazy interesting to me so enjoy this one it's technical at times but I think this is a very important topic I talk about LDL cholesterol cardiovascular risk all the time because when you are eating an animal-based diet and avoiding seed oils polyunsaturated fat Rich seed oils and you're eating animal foods with saturated fat often LDL will go up the last couple of times I've checked my LDL it was 165 milligrams per deciliter I actually just got a test of blood work when I was in the United States last week my LDL is now 130 milligrams per deciliter so it's coming down a little bit but the thing that I think is most important is your context how metabolically healthy you are how insulin sensitive you are I don't think LDL matters that much if you are insulin sensitive and I talk about why with Dr Twyman in this podcast and I get his perspective as a board-certified cardiologist and we even hear about things like endothelial health and how to really get a sense of your cardiovascular risk Way Beyond what happens in a traditional cholesterol panel all right guys onto the podcast with Dr Mike Twyman enjoy this one

chunks.title: Understanding LDL Cholesterol
chunks.summary: The discussion delves into LDL cholesterol, its interpretation in the context of an animal-based diet, and the implications of viewing LDL levels in isolation. The host shares personal lipid test results to emphasize that context, such as insulin sensitivity, is crucial for understanding cardiovascular risk.
